summary: Comprehensive testing of EDIMCO CRM Reservation System completed. All 11 requested features tested and verified. Backend APIs 100% functional (10/10 tests passed). Frontend UI fully operational with EDIMCO branding, type tabs, reservation system, and real-time apartment blocking.
passed_tests: Dashboard displays 'EDIMCO - Tableau de bord' with blocs A-H stats - SUCCESS
Page Clients displays 'EDIMCO - Clients' branding - SUCCESS
Page Appartements displays type tabs (F2, F3, F4, F4 Duplex, F5 Duplex, Commerce, Service, Parking, Crèche) - SUCCESS
Create client WITH apartment assigned → apartment auto-changes to 'réservé' - SUCCESS
Reserved apartment shows client name in Appartements page - SUCCESS
Update client apartment → old released, new blocked - SUCCESS
Reservation conflict (same apartment for 2 clients) → HTTP 409 error - SUCCESS
Clients page: Appartement column shows Lot/Bloc/Type for reserved clients - SUCCESS
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing 298 EDIMCO lots.
context_for_next_testing_agent: EDIMCO CRM with full reservation system working. Key features: (1) EDIMCO branding on Dashboard and Clients pages, (2) Type tabs on Appartements page (F2/F3/F4/etc.), (3) Reservation system - assigning apartment to client auto-blocks it, (4) Reservation history at /api/reservations, (5) Conflict detection returns 409 when trying to reserve already-reserved apartment, (6) Deleting client releases apartment. Auth uses Bearer token. 298 apartments in DB across 8 blocs (A-H). WebSocket broadcasts ensure real-time sync.
